title: psychotria calva var. cicatricosa
intro: Psychotria calva var. cicatricosa, a rare and lesser-known variant of the Psychotria calva species, is a type of evergreen shrub native to the tropical regions of the Americas. It is prized for its medicinal properties, which include antimalarial, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, thanks to its high concentration of alkaloids and flavonoids. The health benefits of Psychotria calva var. cicatricosa include its potential to treat various conditions such as fever, digestive issues, and respiratory problems, as well as its ability to boost the immune system and reduce inflammation. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is sometimes used in folk medicine to treat various ailments, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
